description: Power BI semantic model (dataset) for analytics. Supports Direct Lake (TMDL) and Import (model.bim)

definition_parts.description: Required entry point. TMDL: {"version":"4.2","settings":{}} with schema URL. model.bim: {"version":"3.0"}
TMDL: one file per table with columns/measures/partitions
Import: full tabular model JSON (compatibilityLevel 1604, powerBI_V3)

flags.--connection: SQL Analytics Endpoint ID for Direct Lake binding

notes: Direct Lake REQUIRES TMDL format (model.bim cannot express directLake partitions)
model.bim MUST use compatibilityLevel 1604 and powerBI_V3
After creation, call refresh to frame Direct Lake: fabio semantic-model refresh
Call takeover to make editable in portal: fabio semantic-model takeover
definition.pbism is ALWAYS required regardless of format
